name: The Vault Under the Big Top
text:
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
{3}, {T}: You gain 2 life and create a Treasure token. Everyone assumes the carnival's money is in a satchel under a clown's bed. It is in a vault the size of a town, directly beneath the center pole.
flavorText: The combination is the highest number anyone at this table has ever rolled. Nobody remembers it. The vault does.
